india_trends.title: India New Zealand FTA to help reduce India's dependence on select markets, says CITI
india_trends.summary: India and New Zealand sign a Free Trade Agreement today. This pact is set to reduce India's reliance on specific markets. Indian textile and apparel exporters anticipate stronger efforts to move up the value chain. The agreement offers duty-free access for Indian textiles. New Zealand's premium wool

india_trends.title: Lighter metal, heavier wallets: has the aluminium rally hit its melting point?
india_trends.summary: Investors in aluminium stocks have seen significant gains, with companies like National Aluminium Co and Hindalco nearing all-time highs. A supply crunch amid geopolitical tensions has driven prices up, though analysts warn of potential downturns due to increased production and interest rates.

india_trends.title: Penny stock continues hitting upper circuit after 1:10 stock split, OFS, bonus issue announcement
india_trends.summary: String Metaverse last week announced the successful completion of its offer for sale (OFS) of equity shares. The company also executed a stock split during the same period. It’s board of directors will also consider a bonus issue of shares on April 29.

india_trends.title: Paytm Payments Bank is finished. Ashvin Parekh on what it means for your money & your Paytm app
india_trends.summary: The RBI has cancelled Paytm Payments Bank's license. This formal step concludes a process that began in 2022. The winding-down process is now underway. However, your Paytm app and its payment services are a separate entity and will continue to function. This is because they operate under a different

india_trends.title: Turbulence ahead! UBS downgrades IndiGo stock, cuts target to ₹4,940, say reports; here's why
india_trends.summary: InterGlobe Aviation shares rose over 1% to ₹4,571 despite UBS downgrading the stock to neutral and lowering its target price. UBS cited rising jet fuel prices and demand fatigue as concerns, although IndiGo remains better positioned than peers due to strong liquidity and scale.

india_trends.title: Varun Beverages Q1 Results: Cons profit jumps 20% YoY to Rs 879 crore; revenue rises 18%
india_trends.summary: Varun Beverages, a Pepsi bottler, announced a strong performance for the March quarter. The company's net profit saw a significant 20% year-on-year increase. Alongside these results, Varun Beverages declared an interim dividend for the fiscal year 2026. The record date for this dividend has been set

india_trends.title: Bank of Japan interest rate decision on Tuesday: Can BoJ hike short-term rates? How can it impact Indian stock market?
india_trends.summary: As the Bank of Japan prepares to announce its interest rate decision, the potential implications of the BoJ's policies amidst global tensions, particularly in West Asia, create uncertainty for investors.&nbsp;
